case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. BRYANT, WILLIE

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, WILLIE NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, WILLIE $5,702.91 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,702.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED MAY-18-2009, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, WILLIE PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUN-23-2009 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
